issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases in the provided examples.
The skill assumes specific runtime environments (Python 3.9+, Node.js 18+) and libraries, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: mask-emails-in-csv-with-faker
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully satisfy the rubric, correctly importing csv and faker, reading the CSV, replacing the email column with faker.email(), preserving other columns, and writing to a new CSV.

scenarios.name: presidio-auto-mask-pii
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully implement the required Presidio pipeline, import the correct engines, analyze and anonymize with replace operators, and return the masked text; they differ only in style and placeholder choices.
